SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

Class ElfStringTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection
net.boricj.bft.elf.sections.ElfStringTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<Integer>, StreamWritable, Writable
public class ElfStringTable extends ElfSection implements Iterable<Integer>
ELF string table section for storing symbol names and section names. Strings are stored as null-terminated sequences and referenced by offset.

  • Field Summary

    Description
    ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, String name)

    Creates a new string table with full settings.

    • DEFAULT_CHARSET

      public static final Charset DEFAULT_CHARSET
      Default character encoding for string tables.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElfStringTable

      public ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, String name)
      Creates a new string table with default settings.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name

    • ElfStringTable

      public ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize)
      Creates a new string table with specified flags and alignment.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size

    • ElfStringTable

      public ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, Charset charset)
      Creates a new string table with full settings.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      name - section name
      flags - section flags
      addr - section virtual address
      offset - section file offset
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size
      charset - character encoding for strings

    • ElfStringTable

      public ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize) throws IOException
      Reads a string table from an ELF file.
      Parameters:
      elf - parent ELF file
      parser - ELF file parser
      flags - section flags
      addr - section virtual address
      offset - section file offset
      size - section size in bytes
      link - section link index
      info - section info field
      addralign - section alignment
      entsize - entry size
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

  • Method Details

    • write

      public void write(OutputStream outputStream) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: Writable
      Writes this object to the given output stream.
      Specified by:
      write in interface StreamWritable
      Specified by:
      write in interface Writable
      Parameters:
      outputStream - the stream to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

    • add

      public int add(String string)
      Adds a string to the string table.
      Parameters:
      string - string to add
      Returns:
      offset of the string in the table

    • add

      public int add(String alias, String target)
      Adds an alias string that shares storage with an existing string. The alias must be a suffix of the target string.
      Parameters:
      alias - alias string to add
      target - existing string that ends with the alias
      Returns:
      offset of the alias in the table

    • get

      public String get(int index)
      Gets a string from the table by its offset.
      Parameters:
      index - offset into the string table
      Returns:
      the string at the given offset

    • find

      public int find(String string)
      Finds the offset of a string in the table.
      Parameters:
      string - string to find
      Returns:
      offset of the string
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the string is not in the table
